put_in.mechanics: gravity, exact ballistic flight, impact on moving tilted surface, sit/detach by support sign

forbidden_check: W enters only as surface height/velocity/accel/slope; no node-referencing term

headline.formation_time_order_s: ~10-20 s to ~3x at G=80 (not yet saturated at 24 s)
headline.control_G0p8: frozen: trapped=1.0, no losses, no transport

unasked_emergence.edge_sand_loss: 24% of grains thrown off the free edge at G=80 (real plates do this)
unasked_emergence.antinode_instability: grains at exact antinode = unstable equilibrium in ballistic 'popcorn' regime; escape slow (>20 s)
unasked_emergence.gamma_window: G=15 barely transports, G=40 clear, G=80 strong; window is measurable and app-relevant

dead_ends_recorded.G4_frozen: G=4 (A=43um): kicks ~1um/bounce, pattern would need >minutes — real Chladni demos live at resonant amplitudes (G tens-hundreds)
dead_ends_recorded.rolling_channel: c_roll=5/7 with c_rr=0.02: rolling resistance exceeds phase-correlation drift by ~30x -> frozen; rolling channel shelved (c002c candidate with measured c_rr)

floors: no air (inverse-Chladni regime excluded by design for now)
no back-reaction of sand mass on plate mode
e/beta/v_stick assumed, not measured; tangential beta is a simplification of Coulomb
single mode (0,1); multi-mode & square plate pending
formation curve not saturated at 24 s
